meta.name: MANIFEST
meta.change_note: Added default player cfg, flags and player settings.

git.note: All links in this file will begin from here. They will need to be joined together to make complete link

types.name: find
types.desc: Add file names to 'get' array and set 'dir'

types.name: root
types.desc: Set 'root' directory and then complete the directory for each file

types.name: link
types.desc: Complete filepath starting from master root

types.name: all
types.desc: Get all files in 'dir', can also just have no nested param and set it as folder directory

types.name: rand
types.desc: Get a random(s) file from 'dir', optional: add filetypes to 'files:[]', also set 'num' for number of files to get

types.name: ext
types.desc: Get files from another repo. 'git' array structure same as below and 'file' array to put type and params

settings.desc: Dev-level backend settings for the site. Can be overridden in the debug menu

safe_mode.desc: Safe override that blocks or reduces the amount of requests to git

pages.desc: Block images from loading on specific pages by adding the page names below

defaults.desc: Default parameters that are used if the item doesnt have parameters set

flags.name: New Release
flags.desc: Include this item in the 'New Releases' section.

flags.name: Featured
flags.desc: Include this item in the 'Featured' section.

flags.name: Completed
flags.desc: This item and all of its related project assets are complete, uploaded and added to the websites database.

flags.name: Awaiting DB Update
flags.desc: This item is ready to have all of its data and assets transfered into the sites database.

flags.name: Awaiting Upload
flags.desc: This item and all of its related assets are ready to upload.

flags.name: Building Release-Assets
flags.desc: This item is complete but release-assets are not yet complete (ie: Documentation, Cover-Art, etc.

flags.name: Testing
flags.desc: This item is currently being tested for quality control.

flags.name: Focused
flags.desc: This item is currently being worked on.

flags.name: Fixing
flags.desc: This item is currently being worked on to fix issues.

flags.name: Pending
flags.desc: This item is currently queued and will be worked on soon.

flags.name: Planning
flags.desc: This item is in its planning stage.

flags.name: To-Do
flags.desc: This item is currently a placeholder.

flags.name: Abandoned
flags.desc: This item did not work out and development has stopped.

flags.name: Disable Auto-Populate
flags.desc: Disable auto-populate of contained items based of items in other lists assigned to this item.

background_mode.desc: Modes to set how to override the background image loading

i.name: limit
i.desc: Set a limit to how many requests can be made

refresh_mode.desc: Set when to refresh current count

i.name: block
i.desc: Dont allow any images to be set
